array.string: cd /Users/robertograu/roxy_trading && set -a && if [ -f '/Users/robertograu/Library/Application Support/RoxyTrading/.env' ]; then source '/Users/robertograu/Library/Application Support/RoxyTrading/.env'; fi && set +a && export PYTHONPATH=/Users/robertograu/roxy_trading:/Users/robertograu/roxy_trading/.venv/lib/python3.9/site-packages${PYTHONPATH:+:$PYTHONPATH} && exec /Users/robertograu/roxy_trading/.venv/bin/python /Users/robertograu/roxy_trading/tools/price_alert_monitor.py --no-fail
